zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy於1545年出生在英國越可爾。她於1565年與Richard Brooke在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1607年之後在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy于1545年出生在英国越可爾。她于1565年与Richard Brooke在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1607年之后在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy was born in 1545, in Yorkshire, England. She married Richard Brooke in 1565, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died after 1607, in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Dorothy est née en 1545, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Brooke en 1565, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée après 1607, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Dorothy wurde 1545 in Yorkshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1565 in England, United Kingdom Richard Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1607 in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy è nata il nel 1545 nel Yorkshire, England. Lei sposato Richard Brooke nel 1565, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì dopo il 1607, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Manchester, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Dorothyは1545年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1565年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1607年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy(은)는 1545년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 이후 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy nasceu em 1545, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Brooke em 1565, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1607, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy родилась в 1545 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Brooke в 1565 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла после 1607 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy nació en 1545, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Brooke en 1565, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió después de 1607, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
